caveats: Cost figures are illustrative order-of-magnitude estimates (per-frame vision-token cost assumption), not exact billing numbers.

This compares FRAME-SELECTION EFFICIENCY only (how many frames each approach sends to an LLM). It does NOT compare answer accuracy/quality -- uniform sampling has no verification step, so an apples-to-apples accuracy comparison isn't available yet.
Single test video (mov_bbb.mp4). Not yet validated across a dataset -- see eval_suite.py for planned multi-clip ablation.
